# bankruptcymalpractice.org

> Free guide to bankruptcy attorney malpractice, bar complaints, fee disgorgement, and finding replacement counsel.

bankruptcymalpractice.org is a free, open-source educational resource. Part of the Bankruptcy Transparency Network.

## Pages

- https://bankruptcymalpractice.org/ -- Overview of bankruptcy attorney malpractice, common forms, statute of limitations, bar complaints
- https://bankruptcymalpractice.org/bar-complaints.html -- State-by-state guide to filing bar complaints
- https://bankruptcymalpractice.org/fee-disgorgement.html -- Fee disgorgement under Section 329
- https://bankruptcymalpractice.org/finding-help.html -- Finding replacement counsel, legal aid, pro bono

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
